positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a whimsical celestial scene. Focus on a glowing nebula structure seamlessly integrated with minimalist mountain peaks and crescent moons. Use deep indigo, luminous gold, and ethereal teal colors. The composition must be balanced and centered, forming a clean, strong silhouette suitable for printing on apparel. The style should evoke a blend of Art Deco geometry and modern psychedelic poster art. High contrast is crucial, with clear separation between colored areas and dark background spaces. Vector-graphic cleanliness, perfect symmetry, vibrant pop art aesthetic, printed on white background.
negative: blurry, photorealism, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, low detail, messy, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, graininess, noise
